actions.title: Copilot Approval Queue for Mandatory Route Outputs
actions.action_summary: High mandatory-agent concentration requires a unified approval workflow for production-impacting recommendations.

expected_impact.narrative: High mandatory-agent concentration requires a unified approval workflow for production-impacting recommendations.
expected_impact.evidence: 61 mandatory agents across suite require predictable human-approval gating.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Capability Narrative Drift Guardrail
actions.action_summary: Top-level product narratives drift from generated registry truth, weakening leadership confidence and field alignment.

expected_impact.narrative: Top-level product narratives drift from generated registry truth, weakening leadership confidence and field alignment.
expected_impact.evidence: Detected 0 metric drift rows across README/FEATURES vs generated catalog.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Data Hygiene Sunset Completion
actions.action_summary: Deprecated plugin capabilities still represent migration surface area and support overhead.

actions.title: Unified RevOps Next-Best-Action Layer
actions.action_summary: Insights exist across many agents, but remediation sequencing is fragmented without unified next-best-action ranking.

expected_impact.narrative: Insights exist across many agents, but remediation sequencing is fragmented without unified next-best-action ranking.
expected_impact.evidence: Large command/agent surface supports diagnostics but lacks a common prioritized remediation object.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: AI Maturity Uplift for Lowest-Coverage Plugins
actions.action_summary: AI-enabled capability coverage is uneven across plugins, reducing perceived suite intelligence consistency.

expected_impact.narrative: AI-enabled capability coverage is uneven across plugins, reducing perceived suite intelligence consistency.
expected_impact.evidence: Lowest AI-enabled ratios: opspal-gtm-planning (0.0%), opspal-monday (0.0%), opspal-marketo (11.5%).

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Cross-Plugin Command Telemetry Contract
actions.action_summary: Command-level outcomes are not normalized for comparable executive-level KPI tracking across plugins.

expected_impact.narrative: Command-level outcomes are not normalized for comparable executive-level KPI tracking across plugins.
expected_impact.evidence: No suite-wide command telemetry schema is published for standardized outcome collection.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Manual Review Load Reduction in Dedup and Routing
actions.action_summary: Manual review checkpoints are necessary but expensive; confidence-scored triage can shrink review volume.

expected_impact.narrative: Manual review checkpoints are necessary but expensive; confidence-scored triage can shrink review volume.
expected_impact.evidence: Multiple dedup/routing workflows explicitly escalate to manual review states.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Strategy Dashboard Gap Category Feeds
actions.action_summary: The strategy dashboard command does not yet consume dedicated AI-gap and feature-gap portfolio payloads.

expected_impact.narrative: The strategy dashboard command does not yet consume dedicated AI-gap and feature-gap portfolio payloads.
expected_impact.evidence: Gap payloads are not currently published as explicit dashboard category data sources.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.

actions.title: Initiative ROI Instrumentation Layer
actions.action_summary: ROI reporting exists in pockets; initiative-level KPI baseline/target tracking is not consistently surfaced for executives.

expected_impact.narrative: ROI reporting exists in pockets; initiative-level KPI baseline/target tracking is not consistently surfaced for executives.
expected_impact.evidence: Self-improvement ROI tooling exists, but not all feature initiatives map to standardized executive KPI objects.

actions.title: Cross-Model Consultation Expansion
actions.action_summary: Cross-model consultation value is concentrated in a single plugin rather than embedded in key orchestration paths.

expected_impact.narrative: Cross-model consultation value is concentrated in a single plugin rather than embedded in key orchestration paths.

actions.title: Forecast and Simulation Standardization
actions.action_summary: Forecasting/simulation logic is distributed across domains without a shared confidence and scenario contract.

expected_impact.narrative: Forecasting/simulation logic is distributed across domains without a shared confidence and scenario contract.
expected_impact.evidence: Simulation and forecast capabilities exist but are not normalized into one reusable suite contract.

actions.rollback_plan: Revert to prior recommendation set, close linked approval request, and rerun exec validation gates.
